title: CrackedandBroken
description: Cracked and Broken adds natural cracks and mossy variations to stone, giving your Minecraft caves and builds a rugged, weathered look.
body:
**Cracked and Broken**

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd47ea105c2e01dbc9f9eef1e167e966282ed3a2_0.webp)

Transform the look of Minecraft's stone blocks with Cracked and Broken! 

This resource pack introduces subtle yet immersive variations of cracked and mossy stones while keeping the classic stone texture as a dominant element. Perfect for enhancing caves, cliffs, and builds with a worn and weathered aesthetic. 

Add depth to your world with natural cracks and hints of moss, breathing life into the underground!

***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.  

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1256117/description_64c320a5-8d4b-4911-97d9-ae44570af17c.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Azturax)
